channel.title: welcome on da blog
channel.description: Recent content in welcome on da blog

item.title: Welcome
item.description: Yo. Going to start using this to write about some things that I am too lazy to make videos about. I feel like people are more inclined to reading things nowadays instead of watching videos. The issue with my videos is they’re not TikToks, and they cover topics many find mundane. Hopefully I can circumvent this by making periodic blog posts.

item.title: my arsenal
item.description: list of devices i’ve daily driven for an extended period please note that i like testing a researching a lot, so this is always subject to change. I plan on eventually writing more in depth about my experiences with said devices, as I think it would be more beneficial to get the information out in some sort of accessible written form instead of having to wait for me to script, record, edit, and upload a YouTube video.

item.title: who am i???
item.description: howdy y’all. many of you know me as tokisuno. i am a 21 year old content creator studying linguistics pursuing a masters degree who makes videos from time to time on lifestyle/improvement shit, along with tech and things i am generally interested in.
